stories.headline: OpenAI IPO delay report triggers AI infrastructure spending sustainability concern; chip stocks lead Nasdaq to 5th consecutive loss
May PCE: headline 4.1% YoY, core 3.4% YoY — highest readings since 2023
Fed voter Kashkari (Minneapolis) pivots hawkish, explicitly pencils in one rate hike for 2026
Brent slides further to ~$72 (from $78); Iran temporarily closes Strait of Hormuz Saturday citing Israeli strikes on Hezbollah — ceasefire thread fraying
UMich June final: sentiment 49.5 (revised up from 48.9); 5-year inflation expectations drop sharply to 3.3% from 3.9%
Weekly jobless claims 215K vs 225K expected; labor market holds up
Alphabet joins Dow Jones Industrial Average effective Monday 29 June, replacing Verizon — passive rebalancing flows into GOOGL before Monday open
EU AI Act Article 50 transparency obligations apply from 2 August 2026 — 35 days out; fines up to 1.5% of global revenue for non-compliance
